segments.title: Context: previous server rendering model
segments.summary: Describes the prior single-pass server render where the Document shell and page RSC payload were rendered in one nested pass. Establishes how this advanced React's internal useId counter before app content rendering, setting up later mismatch.
segments.retrieval_summary: describe previous single-pass ssr with Document and rsc nested; server advance useid counter; merged.

segments.title: Problem: useId hydration mismatch
segments.summary: Explains non-deterministic React.useId sequences between server and client due to the server rendering extra Document content first. Client hydrates only app content, causing diverging ID sequences and discarded server DOM.
segments.retrieval_summary: identify hydration mismatch from nondeterministic react.useid between server and client; server render extra Document; merged.

segments.title: Solution: isolate renders and stitch streams
segments.summary: Adopts two isolated server renders (appHtmlStream and documentHtmlStream) and stitches them by injecting app output at a placeholder in the document stream. Preserves streaming and guarantees identical useId sequencing across server and client.
segments.retrieval_summary: implement two isolated renders and stream stitching with placeholder inject; align useid sequences; merged.

segments.title: Benefit: Document becomes a Server Component
segments.summary: States that the user-defined Document is now a true RSC, enabling async/await and server-only access within the shell. Notes alignment with developer expectations and updated documentation.
segments.retrieval_summary: document become rsc; enable async data and server-only access; docs update; merged.

segments.title: Implementation commits for stream stitching
segments.summary: Lists implementation commits covering two-phase render bridge, RSC payload injection timing, removing Document option, and various fixes and refactors to tests and worker integration.
decisions: Implement two-stream stitching across code paths
segments.retrieval_summary: implementation commits for two-stream stitching, worker integration, and tests; includes bb06dfc, e7ee85c, 0f2abd4, 727f916; merged.

segments.title: ID collision risk across concurrent renders
segments.summary: Reviewer asks about duplicate IDs when rendering concurrently. Author agrees and commits to using different identifier prefixes to avoid collisions during stitching.
decisions: Use different identifier prefixes across renders
segments.retrieval_summary: review flags duplicate ids risk; decide to use different identifierprefix across renders; merged.

segments.title: (revisit) Add identifier prefixes and update tests
segments.summary: Follow-up commits add identifierPrefix to render APIs and update tests and ID patterns to reflect the new prefixing. Ensures deterministic and non-colliding IDs.
decisions: Adopt prefixes in APIs and tests
segments.retrieval_summary: add identifierprefix to render apis and update tests; commits 25ba65a, 0d4b8c3, 57b2c15; merged.
